Our Story

An independent shop with a service-department soul

Drop a photo of the team or shop exterior

We built Apex around a simple idea: that precision and honesty don't have to cost dealership prices. Every vehicle is photographed during inspection, every estimate is written before a wrench turns, and every repair is backed for three years. Fifteen years on, the proof is that most new customers arrive because someone they trust sent them.

— The Apex Auto Works team
Services

Considered, complete car care

Diagnostics photo
01

Diagnostics & Electronics

Factory-level scan platforms read the fault directly — so you pay to fix the cause, never to chase symptoms.

  • Check-engine & warning lights
  • Hybrid & turbo systems
  • Electrical & module faults
Brakes photo
02

Brakes, Tires & Alignment

The systems that keep you safe, serviced to spec — with a complimentary brake check on every visit.

  • Pads, rotors & calipers
  • Mount, balance & rotate
  • Laser four-wheel alignment
Maintenance photo
03

Maintenance & Repair

From full-synthetic oil service to suspension and scheduled factory intervals that protect your warranty.

  • Full-synthetic oil & fluids
  • Suspension & steering
  • Factory-interval maintenance
The Difference

Why drivers entrust us their cars

I

Transparent estimates

Photo-documented and written before any work begins. The quote is the price.

II

Dealer-grade tools

The same diagnostic platforms the manufacturers use — fixed right the first time.

III

Complimentary loaners

A loaner car on most longer repairs, so your schedule never has to stop.

IV

Three-year warranty

36,000 miles on parts and labor, honored nationwide. True peace of mind.

V

Master technicians

ASE-certified and continually trained on modern drivetrains and electronics.

VI

Never an upsell

We recommend only what's due and flag what's ahead. Nothing invented.

The Process

Three unhurried steps

01

Reserve your visit

Book online or by phone and tell us what you're noticing. We plan the appointment around it.

02

Review the diagnosis

We inspect, photograph, and send a written estimate. Nothing proceeds without your approval.

03

Drive away assured

We complete the work to factory spec and you leave covered by a three-year warranty.

Questions

Good to know

Do you service my make and model?+

Domestic, Asian, and most European makes — including hybrids and turbocharged engines. If we're not the right fit, we'll point you to someone who is.

Will independent service void my factory warranty?+

No. We can perform scheduled maintenance without affecting your manufacturer warranty, and we document every visit for your records.

Do I always get an estimate first?+

Always. You'll receive a written, photo-backed estimate, and no work begins until you approve it.

How long do most repairs take?+

Many services are completed the same day. For longer jobs we provide complimentary loaner cars.

What exactly does the warranty cover?+

Three years or 36,000 miles on parts and labor, honored nationwide through our service network.
